title: Migrate from Notion to Obsidian: Complete Guide
excerpt: Step-by-step guide to export your Notion workspace and import it into Obsidian, including tips for fixing broken formatting.

title: Migrate from Slack to Rocket.Chat: Complete Guide
excerpt: Move your team chat from Slack to self-hosted Rocket.Chat, including message history, channels, and file migration.

title: Migrate from Figma to Penpot: Complete Guide
excerpt: Use the official Penpot Exporter Figma plugin to transfer your designs to the open-source design platform.

title: Migrate from Jira to Plane: Complete Guide
excerpt: Use Plane's built-in Jira importer to transfer issues, states, and users from Jira Cloud, Server, or Data Center.

title: Migrate from GitHub to Gitea: Complete Guide
excerpt: Mirror or migrate your repositories from GitHub to a self-hosted Gitea instance, preserving history, issues, and pull requests.

title: Migrate from Zoom to Jitsi Meet: Complete Guide
excerpt: Switch your video meetings from Zoom to self-hosted Jitsi Meet — no account required, fully private, and free.
